arguments.argument:
event_inherited() setCollisionBounds(-5,-5,5,5)
damageType="THROW" weaponTag=31 atkLv=global.stBelmont_Axe[0] atkPower=global.stBelmont_Axe[3] atkPower=weaponDmgMod(1,atkPower) global.recAtkNum+=1 stunTime=6
if oPlayer1.image_xscale=1 { x+=12 direction=80 } else { image_xscale=-1 x-=12 direction=100 }
if oPlayer1.yVel>0 { oPlayer1.yVel=0 scrSlowFall(2,0.5,0) } bulletSpeed=12 arcTime=25 lifeTime=45
